decisions.title: Prioritize FedRAMP compliance work vs. Core product features
decisions.context: Heavy FedRAMP compliance backlog (ENG-9341, ENG-9307, ENG-9326, ENG-9304, ENG-9305, ENG-9694, ENG-9695) competing with Explore V2/Canvas/Python Rules development. Build the Moat requires compliance, but Nail the Core needs feature velocity.

arguments.for: FedRAMP opens enterprise market (Moat). Security debt creates risk. Compliance work is time-bounded.
arguments.against: Delays Explore V2 GA and Canvas improvements. Team context-switching reduces velocity. Customer-facing features drive North Star metric directly.

decisions.title: Canvas GA readiness: Ship toolbar rework or defer for stability
decisions.context: ENG-9571 (Canvas toolbar/styling rework) in flight while ENG-9975 shows family stat preview bugs. Embed Deeper pillar needs stable Canvas, but UX improvements may introduce risk pre-GA.

arguments.for: Better UX drives adoption. Address design debt now vs. post-GA breaking changes. Market expects polished product.
arguments.against: Stability critical for enterprise deployment. Bugs like ENG-9975 indicate fragility. Can iterate post-GA with established user base.

decisions.title: Explore V2 feature flag strategy: Clean up now or gate additional features
decisions.context: ENG-9339 cleaning up configurable-downsampling flag, ENG-9779 audit needed for E2 GA. Feature flag debt accumulating. ENG-9995 shows failure modes create customer risk.

arguments.for: Technical debt slows velocity. GA requires clean flag state. Failure modes (ENG-9995) indicate over-complexity.
arguments.against: Cleanup takes engineering time from features. Gradual rollout still needed for risk mitigation. Can defer to post-GA hardening sprint.

decisions.title: Redpanda migration (ENG-9176): Commit timeline or descope
decisions.context: Redpanda deployment into EC2 underway. Infrastructure shift during product push creates risk but may improve performance/cost for Scale pillar.
decisions.blockedBy: Resource allocation unclear; migration impact on Catalog Update Service (ENG-9424, ENG-9427) unknown

arguments.for: Better performance/cost supports scale. Kafka operational overhead high. Now is cleanest migration window.
arguments.against: Distraction from product goals. Migration risk during product launches. Kafka works; optimization can wait.

decisions.title: Python Rules integration scope: Horizons full integration vs. MVP
decisions.context: ENG-10002 (Sift-Horizons integration) signals Python Rules connecting to broader ecosystem. Nail the Core requires focus, but Embed Deeper benefits from integrations.

arguments.for: Integrations drive stickiness (Embed Deeper). Horizons unlocks new use cases. Customers expect ecosystem connectivity.
arguments.against: Scope creep delays core Python Rules stability. Integration complexity introduces support burden. MVP proves value first.
